User-agent: *
Allow: /

# 禁止爬取的目录
Disallow: /node_modules/
Disallow: /.vitepress/
Disallow: /.git/
Disallow: /assets/chunks/

# 允许爬取的重要页面
Allow: /AIknowledge/
Allow: /book/
Allow: /cross-border/
Allow: /self-media/
Allow: /edu-knowlege/
Allow: /curriculum/
Allow: /healthy/
Allow: /movies/
Allow: /tools/
Allow: /chinese-traditional/
Allow: /auto/
Allow: /movie-recommendations/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://doc.869hr.uk/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# 搜索引擎特定设置
User-agent: Googlebot
Crawl-delay: 0
Allow: /

# Googlebot 图片/视频爬虫
User-agent: Googlebot-Image
Crawl-delay: 0
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot-Video
Crawl-delay: 0
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Crawl-delay: 1
Allow: /

# Bing 图片爬虫
User-agent: adidxbot
Crawl-delay: 1
Allow: /

# DuckDuckGo
User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Crawl-delay: 1
Allow: /
